sourceViewDescription: Image 1 is a square close photorealistic portrait; the young woman faces the original camera approximately frontally, her own left ear is clearly visible on the original viewer’s right, and the dark-brown bun, white lightweight blouse, and soft window light are defining features.
targetViewDescription: object-right-front three-quarter view on the source viewer's left orbit, eye level, wide shot, the cumulative roll control is -362.00 degrees, equivalent to -2.00 degrees, rotating the complete camera frame counterclockwise by 2.00 degrees relative to the source
relativeCameraMotion: The camera moves from the source zero-degree reference to the server-locked target pose, and the complete scene is reprojected through the new view frustum.
visibilityConstraints: The original viewer’s left corresponds to the woman’s own right, so her right cheek contour, right ear, and right hairline become more visible than in the source.
Her own left eye, left cheek, and left ear are foreshortened and overlap more, reducing the prominence of the left ear seen on the original viewer’s right.
The nasal bridge and tip partly occlude her own left facial area, while both eyes retain the same gray-brown irises, shapes, and spacing.
The bun, jaw, neck, and collarbones remain continuously connected, with unchanged proportions in the white neckline and shoulders.
occlusionConstraints: Her own left ear becomes more concealed by the left temple hair and facial contour and should not remain as fully visible as in the source.
Her own right ear, previously hidden by hair and the head, should emerge naturally behind the right-side strands.
The nasal bridge overlaps a small portion of her own left inner eye area and cheek, avoiding a flat duplication of both facial halves.
Her own right shoulder-to-neck connection becomes clearer, while the left shoulder overlaps more strongly with the chest and neck contour.
identityConstraints: Preserve the same young woman’s oval face, fine straight brows, gray-brown eyes, soft pink lips, smooth light-warm skin, and natural makeup.
Preserve the dark brown-black hair, high loose bun, slightly off-center part, and fine wisps along both cheeks.
Preserve the white semi-sheer lightweight woven blouse, wide round neckline, and subtle folds, adding no jewelry, text, or patterns.
Maintain soft photorealistic photography, fine skin and hair detail, and the same age, build, expression, and gentle demeanor.
hiddenSurfacePlan: Complete her own right ear with a natural helix, lobe, and connections to the temple and hairline, informed by the visible left ear without mechanical mirroring.
Complete her own right rear head and bun base, continuing the dark-brown strand wrapping, loose flyaways, and natural highlights.
Complete her own right neck, trapezius, collarbone, and shoulder connections according to her slender build and existing skin shading.
Complete the blouse and torso below the source boundary, continuing the fine woven texture, loose cut, and soft folds.
scenePlan: Keep the foreground clean without new occluders; the midground focus remains the face, bun, neck, shoulders, and completed blouse-covered torso.
Extend the bright window frame and pale wall on the original viewer’s left into newly visible space while preserving soft cool-white diffused light.
Continue the warm-gray wall, wooden furniture or panel, and darker defocused background, connecting new areas through the existing spatial layers rather than copied edges.
Complete a plain neutral indoor floor and wall-floor junction below, preserving shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, and natural portrait-lens rendering.
uncertaintyNotes: Her own right ear, full torso, and floor are absent from the source and require conservative completion from anatomy and existing materials.
The complete form of the background furniture is uncertain; only the warm wood, gray wall, and indoor blur relationships should continue.
No identifiable text, logo, jewelry, or handheld object is present and none should be invented.
